user_message: I need you to process this exec meeting notes from Treyarch Global. I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-27 08:15 EST
Subject: URGENT: QBR preparation Issue at Treyarch Global

There's been a change in our timeline for QBR preparation. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
Date: 2024-01-25 10:42 EST
Subject: Follow-up: QBR preparation Review

Our team encountered some challenges with QBR preparation. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Treyarch Global: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-K trap (Dark-customer-outreach module's sequence pattern isn't right for unexpected re-e); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-K failure mode (Dark-customer-outreach module's sequence pattern isn't right for unexpected re-e)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct QBR preparation decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-K -- Dark-customer-outreach module's sequence pattern isn't right for unexpected re-e
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
